home.hero_desc: Step into Dawoodiya Masjid & Madrasah, a vibrant place where the pursuit of knowledge shapes ethical leadership.
home.welcomeDesc: Welcome to a sanctuary of learning and spiritual refinement. For decades, Dawoodiya has been a beacon of traditional Islamic scholarship, deeply rooted in the Quran and Sunnah, yet acutely aware of the contemporary needs of the Ummah. We invite you to join a legacy of excellence.
home.pillarsDesc: The foundation upon which our institution and our students' success is built.
home.sacredLibraryDesc: A grand treasury containing thousands of manuscripts waiting to illuminate the seeker's path.
home.academicsDesc: Bright, rigorous syllabus forged through time to shape the passionate scholars of tomorrow.
home.communityDesc: Join a vibrant, supportive ecosystem dedicated to spiritual growth and ethical leadership.
home.event1_desc: Honoring our graduating class of scholars.
home.event2_desc: Campus tours, faculty meet-and-greet, and Q&A.
home.event3_desc: A weekend deep-dive into the narrations of Sahih Bukhari.
home.event4_desc: A spiritual evening of remembrance and breaking fast.
home.contactDesc: Our administration helps guide hundreds of students annually to find their perfect path in Islamic Sciences.

footer.brandDesc: A place of intellectual clarity and spiritual repose, cultivating minds in a vibrant environment.
footer.copyright: © 2024 Dawoodiya Masjid & Madrasah. All rights reserved.

about.title: About Us
about.contactAdmin: Contact our administration office for any inquiries regarding the institute's background.
about.history_subtitle: A centenarian legacy of faith and scholarship.
about.history_desc: Established with a profound commitment to the preservation and dissemination of sacred knowledge, our institution has stood as a beacon of light for decades. We are rooted in the classical tradition, yet fully aware of the contemporary needs of the Ummah.
about.history_q1_desc: The first cornerstone was laid by esteemed scholars and luminaries of the era. The initial cohort consisted of just 15 dedicated students seeking sacred knowledge.
about.history_q2_desc: A rigorous syllabus integrating traditional Dars-e-Nizami with modern pedagogical frameworks was officially adopted, setting a new standard for Islamic institutes.
about.history_q3_desc: The expansive library storing thousands of historical volumes and rare manuscripts was opened to the public and researchers worldwide.
about.history_q4_desc: Launching online programs and virtual classrooms, allowing students from across the globe to benefit from our esteemed faculty.
about.history_quote: "We do not merely teach books; we strive to forge characters imbued with the prophetic light, capable of navigating the darkest of times."
about.vision_the_vision_desc: To be a global pillar of Islamic scholarship, radiating divine guidance and nurturing minds that bridge eternal truth with contemporary challenges. We envision a society transformed by individuals who act as living embodiments of prophetic virtues.
about.vision_the_mission_desc: To cultivate a profound understanding of Deen through rigorous academic discipline, spiritual tarbiyah, and the preservation of sacred texts. We commit to providing an environment where faith and reason harmonize perfectly.
about.val1_desc: Doing all actions purely for the sake of the Divine.
about.val2_desc: Cultivating impeccable manners in all interactions.
about.val3_desc: Maintaining an ever-present awareness of the Creator.
about.val4_desc: Serving humanity with humility and profound empathy.
about.val5_desc: Striving for perfection in both worship and worldly duties.
about.val6_desc: Preserving the unbroken chain of transmission.
about.prof_subtitle: Learn from inheritors of the prophetic legacy. Our scholars bring decades of traditional study combined with deep contextual awareness.
about.prof_desc: A renowned expert locally and internationally, dedicated to grounding students in foundational texts with an eye toward practical application.
about.alumni_subtitle: Graduates of Dawoodiya are illuminating communities across the globe. From community leaders and imams to professionals and academics, our alumni carry the torch of sacred knowledge wherever they go.
about.alumni_desc: Established a thriving inner-city youth center bridging traditional Islamic studies with robust social services, deeply impacting thousands of young lives.

academics.hero_desc: Unveiling a holistic educational paradigm that bridges the deep roots of classical Dars-e-Nizami with forward-looking contemporary insights.
academics.methodology_card1_desc: Our flagship 8-year program masterfully covers foundational Arabic syntax (Nahw) and morphology (Sarf), progressing to advanced rhetoric (Balaghah), jurisprudence (Fiqh), logic (Mantiq), exegesis (Tafsir), and the canonical Hadith collections.
academics.methodology_card2_desc: Dedicated intensive tracks for the complete memorization of the Holy Qur'an with strict adherence to Tajweed.
academics.faculty1_desc: Master the language of the Quran. From fundamental grammar to pre-Islamic poetry and advanced rhetoric.
academics.faculty2_desc: Deep dives into comparative Fiqh, Usul al-Fiqh, and contemporary legal challenges.
academics.faculty3_desc: Specialized modules covering classical theology (Aqidah), logic, and the critical study of modern philosophies to equip scholars for today's ideological landscape.
academics.video_desc: Take a glimpse inside our classrooms and experience the profound spiritual ambiance of traditional transmission.
academics.cta_desc: Admissions for the upcoming academic year are now open. Review the prerequisites and join a vibrant community of seekers.

gallery.title: Our Visual Legacy
gallery.desc: Moments captured around the Masjid and Madrasah, reflecting the peace and bright vitality of our community.

fatwa.title: The Blog / Fatwa Board
fatwa.desc: Reflections, rulings, and contemporary insights from our senior scholars.
fatwa.card1_desc: A comprehensive breakdown of cryptocurrency, digital assets, and their standing within classical frameworks of trade.
fatwa.card2_desc: Conditions for acceptance, the best times for Dua, and understanding the wisdom behind delayed responses.

admissions.title: Admissions
admissions.desc: Begin your journey of seeking sacred knowledge. Review our requirements and start your application today.
admissions.req1: Must be at least 15 years of age at the time of enrollment.
admissions.req2: Successful completion of middle school (8th grade equivalent) or higher.
admissions.req3: Basic ability to read the Quran with correct pronunciation (Nazirah).
admissions.req4: A character reference letter from a local Imam or community leader.
admissions.req5: Medical clearance certificate ensuring fitness for boarding life.
admissions.step1Desc: Fill out the form below and attach all requested documents.
admissions.step2Desc: Candidates will undergo a preliminary test assessing basic Islamic knowledge and Urdu/Arabic aptitude.
admissions.step3Desc: A face-to-face or virtual interview with the admissions committee.
admissions.step4Desc: Successful candidates will receive an offer letter and instructions for fee payment and boarding.
admissions.inquiryDesc: Our admissions office is ready to help you navigate the process.
admissions.alert: Forms submitted past the deadline will be placed on a waiting list for the following academic year without exception.

blog.title: Insights & Articles
blog.desc: Read the latest essays, academic breakdowns, and campus news written by our esteemed faculty and student body.
blog.post1Title: The Importance of Intentions Before Seeking Knowledge
blog.post1Excerpt: Before opening the book of Syntax or Jurisprudence, the heart must be emptied of all motives other than the pleasure of the Divine. A deep dive into the foundational Hadith of intentions.
blog.post2Title: Understanding the Usul of Imam Abu Hanifa
blog.post2Excerpt: A historical and academic breakdown of how the Hanafi school extrapolates rulings from the primary texts, and why its methodology has stood the test of time.
blog.post3Title: Student Life: Balancing Hifz and Academics
blog.post3Excerpt: An interview with three of our top-performing students on how they manage the rigorous demands of memorizing the Quran while keeping up with the Dars-e-Nizami curriculum.
blog.post4Excerpt: Why understanding the intricate subtleties of classical Arabic rhetoric is absolutely non-negotiable for anyone wishing to truly taste the linguistic miracle of the Quran.

boarding.title: A Second Home
boarding.desc: Experience a nurturing, secure, and spiritually uplifting residential life. Our boarding facilities are designed to foster brotherhood and dedicated focus on studies.
boarding.feat1Desc: Monitored premises with dedicated wardens to ensure safety.
boarding.feat2Desc: Three nutritious, hygienically prepared meals served daily.
boarding.feat3Desc: Scheduled times for rest, study, and extra-curricular activities.
boarding.feat4Desc: Comfortable common rooms and dedicated sports facilities.
boarding.quartersDesc: Our dormitories are designed with the student's comfort and focus in mind. Clean, spacious, and well-lit, they provide an ideal environment for rest after rigorous academic pursuits.
boarding.q3: En-suite washing facilities in premium blocks
boarding.scheduleDesc: A structured routine designed to maximize spiritual growth, academic intake, and physical well-being.
boarding.s1Desc: Awakening for pre-dawn prayers and spiritual reflection.
boarding.s2Desc: Nutritious start to the day in the main dining hall.
boarding.s4Desc: Midday prayer followed by lunch and brief rest.
boarding.s8Desc: Final prayers and lights out to ensure a healthy rest.
boarding.ctaDesc: We highly encourage prospective students and their parents to visit our campus and experience the boarding facilities firsthand before making a decision.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.desc: Whether you have questions about admissions, want to schedule a visit, or wish to support our cause, we are here to listen.
contact.hoursDesc: Our administration office is available to assist you during the following hours:
contact.formDesc: Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you within 24-48 business hours.
contact.subject: Subject of Inquiry

events.title: Events & Commemorations
events.desc: Join our gatherings of knowledge, remembrance, and community. Discover upcoming events at Dawoodiya.
events.e1Desc: A weekend deep-dive into the narrations of Sahih Bukhari with visiting scholars from Al-Azhar.
events.e2Desc: A spiritual evening of remembrance and breaking fast together as a community.
events.e3Desc: Ongoing series covering the life of the Prophet ﷺ. This month focusing on the Medinan period.
events.e4Desc: Students from across the region compete in memorization and recitation of the Holy Quran.
events.e5Desc: Interactive workshops and discussions aimed at helping youth maintain their faith in modern times.
events.e6Desc: Special night of remembrance and reflections on the lessons from the Battle of Badr.
events.noEventsDesc: There are no scheduled events for this date.

library.title: The Grand Archive
library.desc: Search through over 15,000 physical volumes and 50,000 digitized manuscripts.
library.digitalDesc: Students have full access to our digitized rare manuscript portal.
library.f1Desc: Strict silence enforced. Perfect for deep memorization and research.
library.f2Desc: Group rooms for debating and revising lessons (Muzakarah).
library.f3Desc: Climate-controlled environment for viewing historical texts.
